positive: A mystical, stylized neon-noir fox silhouette curled up in a geometric, glowing forest scene. The fox is the central focus, depicted with intricate line work and sharp, crisp edges. The forest elements include minimalist crystalline flora, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and stylized geometric vines, all rendered in a vibrant palette of electric blues, neon purples, and cyan accents against a deep indigo and black background. The composition should be perfectly centered and high-contrast, designed for a seamless print repeat on apparel. Studio shot lighting, vector art quality, graphic novel aesthetic, clean lines, 8k resolution.
negative: blur, artifacts, low quality, noise, text, watermark, logo, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, realistic photography, photorealism
